The '''Jedi enclave''' was located in the clouds of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], and run by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Djinn Altis/Legends|Djinn Altis]]. [[Callista Ming]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] there along with other of the [[Altisian Jedi]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}}
